Hi, I'm Magalie Chetrit

A web developer based in New Jersey with over 20 years of experience. I work with WordPress, WooCommerce, React, and modern front-end tools.

magaliechetrit [at] gmail.com  ·  LinkedIn  ·  GitHub

Select Clients

McDonald's, Intel Corp, TopGear Franchise, TMSW.com, ArtEZ University, HANOS International.

Tech Stack

Front-End & UI

  • JavaScript
  • HTML5 / CSS3 / SCSS
  • React
  • Astro.js · Gatsby.js · 11ty

Back-End & APIs

  • Node.js / PHP / MySQL
  • RESTful APIs / GraphQL
  • Docker / MongoDB
  • Express.js / AJAX

CMS & E-Commerce

  • WordPress / WooCommerce
  • Shopify
  • Kirby CMS
  • Squarespace

Tools & AI

  • GitHub Copilot · Claude
  • ChatGPT
  • Figma / Adobe XD
  • Git · Netlify · Vercel

What I'm Working On Now

Last updated: February 2026 · See full now page

Client Projects

  • ErikKorte.nl — Rebuilding a WordPress site for a Dutch funeral home, including a custom condolances plugin.
  • farbest.com — A custom WordPress plugin to filter ingredients.

Personal Projects

  • Photo Grid Maker — A photo grid maker for my Liene Photo Printer.
  • Navesink Web Solutions — My small digital agency in New Jersey.
  • navesink.digital — Helping individuals and businesses organize their digital life.
